calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2018 Off Calendar

Request For Hearing Date On Plaintiffs Request For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant James Arias, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR 711. Telephone: 415-551-0333.

Matthew R. Cody, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Structure Properties, Inc., a Nevada corporation.
Melissa Franklin, COO and Director of Human Resources for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant James Arias, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on October 3, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 27, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Structure Properties, Inc. a Nevada corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant James Arias, an individual, as follows:

Damages - $12,447.13.
Punitive Damages - $15,000.00.
Costs - $575.80.
Total - $28,022.93.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Request For Hearing Date On Plaintiffs Request For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-01-2017 Continued To Feb-01-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2017 Continued To Mar-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
